title: Test management activity in monday.com

posts.author: samal134131 (bhabani samal)
posts.cookedHtml: for my project work as a project manager i would like to know , how we can effectively use monday.com for my SIT/UAT testing there. Currently i am only using the monday.com for project plan and development status track purpose only. but i am not seeing any option to manage the test cycle, where QA/Users can raise bugs and effectively fix it by developer and send it for retest and all process. Please help. Does Monday.com has the capability or we need to integrate with third party? If its third party, which one will be better and seamlessly work with monday.com. Its bit urgent.
